subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God and ye who are attracted to the Beauty of Abha! The rays of divine mercy shine forth from the Dayspring of oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اللهک قوللری و جمال ابهانن منجذبلری انوار رحمانیت مشرق احدیتدن تاباندر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement
